2605.04908.title: Curated AI beats frontier LLMs at pharma asset discovery
2605.04908.paper_summary: General-purpose LLMs with web search are increasingly used to scout the competitive landscape of pharmaceutical pipelines. We benchmark Gosset -- an AI platform with a chat interface backed by curated target-, modality-, and indication-level drug-asset annotations -- against four frontier systems with web access (Claude Opus 4.7, GPT 5.5, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity sonar-pro) on ten niche oncology/immunology targets where most of the pipeline lives in the long tail of preclinical and Asian-developed assets. All five systems receive the same natural-language query and the same JSON output schema. Across 10 targets Gosset returns 3.2x more verified drugs per query than the best frontier system, at perfect precision and 100% recall against the cross-system union of verified drugs. The same curated index is exposed as a Gosset MCP server that any frontier model can call as a tool, suggesting that each of these systems can close most of the recall gap by swapping generic web search for a curated index behind the same chat interface.
2605.04908.paper_summary_zh: 通用型 LLM 搭配網路搜尋越來越多地用於探索製藥管道的競爭格局。我們將 Gosset -- 一個擁有聊天介面的 AI 平台，並由精心策劃的目標、模式和適應症層級的藥物資產註解支持 -- 與四個具有網路訪問的前沿系統（Claude Opus 4.7、GPT 5.5、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Perplexity sonar-pro）進行基準測試，針對十個小眾的腫瘤學/免疫學目標，這些目標大多數位於臨床前和亞洲開發資產的長尾中。所有五個系統都接收相同的自然語言查詢和相同的 JSON 輸出架構。在 10 個目標中，Gosset 每次查詢返回的經過驗證的藥物數量是最佳前沿系統的 3.2 倍，且在對經過驗證的藥物的跨系統聯合中達到完美的精確度和 100% 的召回率。相同的精心策劃的索引作為 Gosset MCP 伺服器公開，任何前沿模型都可以將其作為工具調用，這表明這些系統中的每一個都可以通過用精心策劃的索引替換通用網路搜尋來縮小大部分召回差距。
2605.04908.author: Łukasz Kidziński et.al.
